title: pellaea patula
intro: Pellaea patula, also known as the Rough Buckler Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. The Rough Buckler Fern has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. This plant is also believed to have several health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of heart disease, and acting as an antioxidant. Pellaea patula can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
